what_it_does: The Supabase CLI project configuration for the 'claude-design' local stack. Sets project_id 'gctunhsuwpaxeatwlmuv' and configures every Supabase subsystem: API (port 15421, public+graphql_public schemas, max_rows 1000), local DB (Postgres major_version 17, port 15432), pooler (disabled), migrations (enabled), seed (./seed.sql), realtime (enabled), Studio (port 15423), inbucket email testing, storage (50MiB limit, S3 protocol + vector buckets on), and auth (site_url 127.0.0.1:3000, signup on, anonymous off, MFA mostly off, no external OAuth providers enabled).
observations: Non-default port block (15421/15432/15423/15424) avoids collision with the standard Supabase local ports.
TLS for the API is disabled; the additional_redirect_urls lists an https 127.0.0.1:3000 entry.
auth.email.enable_confirmations = false (no email confirm needed to sign in locally).
minimum_password_length = 6 and password_requirements empty (weak local defaults).
experimental.pgdelta enabled = true (new schema-diff engine instead of legacy migra).
storage.vector and storage.s3_protocol enabled; analytics disabled.
Many secret-bearing fields use env() substitution (OPENAI_API_KEY, Twilio auth token, S3 keys, OAuth secrets).
Inline comment notes auto_expose_new_tables field will be removed 2026-10-30.
standouts: project_id ties this local config to a specific remote Supabase project (the Claude Design connector home).
Custom port range signals this stack runs alongside other Supabase instances on the same host.
conventions: Follows the standard supabase-generated config.toml layout, leaving most options at documented defaults with commented examples.
Uses env() for every secret rather than committing values — matches the repo's secret-handling discipline.
notes: The local-dev Supabase stack config for the Claude Design connector project; mostly stock defaults with custom 1542x/1543x ports and a pinned remote project_id.
questions: Is the project_id the actual production project, or a placeholder local id?
Why is API TLS disabled while an https redirect URL is allow-listed?
purpose_vs_actual: n/a (no stated purpose beyond being the config; content matches a standard Supabase project config).
apparent_themes: fail-safe defaults (anonymous sign-in off, secrets never inline)
intention_signals: Stand up a reproducible local Supabase stack for the Claude Design connector that mirrors a specific remote project, with secrets externalized and ports chosen to coexist with other stacks.
novelty: The deliberately offset port range and the pinned project_id pointing at the connector's remote home.
contribution: Provides the concrete runtime/stack configuration (ports, enabled services, auth posture, project_id binding) that the migration set runs against — the environmental anchor for the Claude Design Supabase substrate.
summary_for_embedding: Supabase CLI config.toml for the claude-design local stack with custom ports, Postgres 17, pgdelta, vector/S3 storage, env-substituted secrets, and a pinned remote project_id.
intention_for_embedding: To configure a reproducible local Supabase development stack mirroring the Claude Design connector's remote project with externalized secrets and non-colliding ports.
